headline: Eaton’s Brightlayer Energy Launch Tests Valuation In AI Power Management
summary: Eaton (NYSE:ETN) has launched Brightlayer Energy, an AI-driven platform for building energy management. The commercial rollout introduces real-time analytics to help owners manage, optimize, and monetize energy use across commercial and industrial properties. The move extends Eaton’s digital energy capabilities beyond data centers and large infrastructure into broader building operations. Eaton, trading at around $356.8 per share, has seen a 22.3% return over the past year and a very large...
